note: Betaflight declares current-meter amperage and amperageLatest as centiamps; ADC scale is documented as mV per 10 A.
For a fixed ADC voltage and offset, reported current is inversely proportional to ibata_scale/currentMeterScale.
The denominator is consistent with amperageLatest in centiamps and dt in microseconds.
Blackbox defines an amperageLatest field when ADC current metering is enabled.
The logged field is assigned directly from Betaflight's current-meter getter.
Blackbox writes the current-sensor offset and scale in the log header for ADC current metering.
For Betaflight logs at or after 3.1.7, the viewer displays amperageLatest by dividing the logged value by 100.
APdrone's Betaflight CLI dump uses the same current-sensor scale as the Blackbox CSV headers.
